name: patchbay
description: Codex-led, evidence-gated delegation to lower-cost coding workers and independent reviewers.

interface.longDescription: Keep Codex as orchestrator and final AI judge while DeepSeek or GLM implements bounded tasks, deterministic tools verify results, and Claude Code optionally reviews them.
defaultPrompt: Use $patchbay:doctor to check worker and sandbox readiness
Use $patchbay:orchestrate to delegate this bounded implementation task
Use $patchbay:review to request an independent review
